content_body: This is a perfect property for two couples, especially if you don’t want to be running up and down stairs and would prefer to be near Blue Ridge area attractions rather than out in the wilderness. The cabin effectively consists of two master suites with king beds, a large common area and a state of the art kitchen. There is an indoor fireplace and another on the deck. Although the temperatures were only in the mid-sixties, we used the deck fireplace every night and it was magical! We will definitely consider this cabin again for future trips to the North Georgia mountains.
title: Couples Trip in a Cabin Close to Downtown Blue Ridge
